untranslatable_reason: Signal requires decomposition of volatility into fundamental vs. transitory components. No allowed indicators directly measure this decomposition. hvol_20 (historical volatility) is used as a proxy for total volatility, and atr_14 stability approximates fundamental volatility stability, but true fundamental/transitory separation requires advanced microstructure analysis (e.g., high-frequency data, bid-ask spreads, order flow analysis) not available in standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using hvol_20 as total volatility proxy (40-60% bounds converted to 0.40-0.60 decimal scale). Approximated fundamental volatility stability using atr_14 < 0.15 (15% threshold). Exit conditions use hvol_20 < 0.35 for transitory vol falling below 35%. Signal is inherently CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as entry/exit should adapt based on market microstructure regime detection.
